benchmark_evidence.claim_boundary: Functional parity and local regression timing only; not a production throughput or latency claim because no dedicated core isolation was used.

claim_boundary: No rotating rigid-rotor BVP, no full FRC transport, no reduced-order substitution.

grid_convergence.claim_boundary: Finite-grid convergence for accepted no-rotation FRC analytical diagnostics only; not external FRC rotating-BVP validation.

go.reason: No equivalent FRC rigid-rotor solver is exposed in the Go surface.

julia.reason: No equivalent FRC rigid-rotor solver is exposed in the Julia surface.

lean.reason: No equivalent executable FRC rigid-rotor solver is exposed in the Lean surface.
